steps.title: Identify the spatial reference
steps.content: The previous sentence specifies a location: “the wall of a university building in the United States.” The sentence beginning with the blank should elaborate on what we observe at that specific location.

steps.title: Connect the location reference to the answer
steps.content: ”There” points back to the wall location from the previous sentence, creating a spatial transition into the description that follows. “Later” introduces an irrelevant time element, “For instance” redundantly suggests another example when the main one was already given, and “However” implies a non-existent contrast. That matches choice A — A is correct.
